user.title: Waktu Solat Malaysia
user.description: Data is sourced from JAKIM via solat.my API. The zone can be changed anytime from the 'Zon' entity on the device page.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to solat.my API. Check your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: A device with this name is already configured.

init.title: Prayer Time Options
init.description: Change the prayer time zone using the 'Zon' entity on the device page. No other options are available here.
